claimText: Environmental and Pollution Control: Mandates compliance with International Convention for the Prevention of Pollution from Ships (MARPOL) Convention and Ballast Water Management (BWM) Convention adopted by International Maritime Organisation (IMO).
evidenceExcerpt: Environmental and Pollution Control: Mandates compliance with International Convention for the Prevention of Pollution from Ships (MARPOL) Convention and Ballast Water Management (BWM) Convention adopted by International Maritime Organisation (IMO).
examUse: Could support a statement-based or institution-feature question.

claimText: - MARPOL is the main international convention covering prevention of pollution of the marine environment by ships from operational or accidental causes.
evidenceExcerpt: - MARPOL is the main international convention covering prevention of pollution of the marine environment by ships from operational or accidental causes.
examUse: Could support a statement-based or institution-feature question.

claimText: - India is a signatory to this Convention.
evidenceExcerpt: - India is a signatory to this Convention.
examUse: Could support a statement-based or institution-feature question.

claimText: - BWM convention is a treaty to help prevent the spread of potentially harmful aquatic organisms and pathogens in ships' ballast water.
evidenceExcerpt: - BWM convention is a treaty to help prevent the spread of potentially harmful aquatic organisms and pathogens in ships' ballast water.

claimText: - India is not a party to the Convention.
